data.title: 国际服活动「Hatsune Miku’s SPECIAL LIVE in Kivotos ~Rehearsal~」
data.summary: [Event Update Notice] Blue Archive’s first collaboration event. Hatsune Miku’s SPECIAL LIVE in Kivot
data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

Blue Archive’s first collaboration event. Hatsune Miku’s SPECIAL LIVE in Kivotos ~Rehearsal~  has been updated!
Come great Kivotos' special guest!

🗓️Period: 6/14(Tue) – 6/28(Tue) 03:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance
Details: https://nexon.link/8p7
